SHANAHAN FOR ADMISSION AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE for DEFENDANTS R3 LRC LLC, R3 HOLDCO LLC is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the application complies with CRC 9.40. ORDER SIGNED.
